name: Chicken Enchilada Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 2-quart baking dish.
3. In a large bowl, combine chicken, cheese, beans, olives, salsa, and chili powder; mix well.
4. Spoon the mixture into the greased baking dish and set aside.
5. In a medium bowl, beat egg. Stir in milk, corn meal, and oil; mix well.
6. Pour the batter evenly over the chicken mixture.
7. Bake at 400°F for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Serve with toppings such as shredded lettuce, chopped onion, chopped tomato, avocado slices, sour cream, and salsa as desired.
